title: ResearcherProfile
description: One line of data/researchers.jsonl (secondary/debug output). Mirrors src/schema.py — keep both in sync.

researcher_id.description: orcid:<id> if an ORCID was resolved, otherwise name:<normalized name>

source_scope.description: Faculty of Economics community UUID in ZORA

handle.description: Stable ZORA identifier, used for de-duplication across harvest runs

orcid_hint.description: ORCID present on this item but not confidently attributed to this specific co-author when the item has multiple authors
